title: Chemical profiling for fungal culture extract
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"pqqgs","text":"Chemical analysis of fungal culture extracts for metabolomic studies","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"y6avn","text":"Dry extract are dissolved to a concentration of 1 mg/mL in methanol LCMS-grade. Injection volume is 2 μL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"7qrpw","text":"Use nitrile gloves, safety goggles and lab coat.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"hwyd3","text":"LC-MS-grade Solvents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lbpbz","text":"Chromatography system: UHPLC Ultimate 3000™ (Thermo Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f3gxs","text":"Mass spectrometer: Orbitrap FT Q-Exactive Focus™ (Thermo Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"r8peq","text":"Data visualization software: FreeStyle® 1.5","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dry extract are dissolved to a concentration of 1 mg/mL in methanol LCMS-grade. Injection volume is 2 μL.
Column: Phenomenex® Kinetex C8 2,6μm 150x2.1mm (Phenomenex) Column temperature: 40 °C Flow rate: 0.5 mL/min Solvents: A = Water + 0.1% formic acid B = Acetonitrile + 0.1% formic acid Gradient:

Acquisition mode: Full MS with data-dependent MS/MS acquisition (dd-MS2, Discovery mode) Ionization mode: Electrospray (ESI+) Mass range (m/z): 133.4 – 2000 Da Detection mode: Centroid Full MS settings: Resolution: 70,000 AGC target: 3 × 10^6 Internal calibrant: m/z 144.98215 (Cu(CH3CN)2 + ) dd-MS2 settings: Resolution: 17,500 AGC target: 1 × 10^5 Isolation window: 0.4 Da Normalized collision energies (NCE): 15 / 30 / 40% Dynamic exclusion: 6 s ESI source parameters: Spray voltage: 3 kV Sheath gas flow rate: 75 (arbitrary units) Auxiliary gas pressure: 20 Capillary temperature: 350 °C Heater temperature: 430 °C
creator: Clémence ROHÉE
